metadata.title: Dream Ceylon Journeys
metadata.description: Private tailor-made Sri Lanka journeys designed by local travel experts.

HomeMetadata.title: Private Sri Lanka Tours
HomeMetadata.description: Private tailor-made Sri Lanka journeys, round tours and local travel planning with Dream Ceylon Journeys.

sigiriya.imageAlt: Sigiriya Lion Rock rising above the green forest at sunrise in Sri Lanka
sigiriya.title: Ancient wonders.
sigiriya.description: Explore timeless kingdoms, misty highlands, wild national parks, and tropical shores on a private journey designed around you.

ella.imageAlt: Blue train travelling through the lush green tea country near Ella, Sri Lanka
ella.title: Slow down.
ella.description: Travel through emerald tea country, mountain villages, waterfalls, and some of the most beautiful railway landscapes in Asia.

yala.imageAlt: Sri Lankan leopard resting in the wilderness of Yala National Park
yala.title: Enter the wild.
yala.description: Experience unforgettable safaris, tropical forests, elephants, leopards, and extraordinary biodiversity with trusted local experts.

mirissa.imageAlt: Golden tropical beach and palm-fringed coastline in Mirissa, Sri Lanka
mirissa.title: Golden shores.
mirissa.description: Unwind beside warm Indian Ocean waters, discover hidden beaches, and add whale watching, surfing, or complete relaxation to your holiday.

TrustBar.ariaLabel: Why travel with Dream Ceylon Journeys

experiences.title: 100+ Experiences
experiences.description: Carefully selected places across Sri Lanka

price.title: Best Price Guarantee
price.description: Transparent rates with no hidden charges

AboutPreview.imageAlt: Sigiriya Rock Fortress surrounded by the Sri Lankan landscape

imageCard.title: Discover Sri Lanka beyond the ordinary.

floatingCard.title: Planned around you
floatingCard.description: Your dates, interests, comfort, and preferred travel pace guide every itinerary.

heading.title: Local knowledge. Personal service. Journeys made for you.
heading.description: Dream Ceylon Journeys is a locally based Sri Lankan destination management and private tour company creating carefully planned journeys across the island.

AboutPreview.body: We combine destination knowledge, comfortable private transport, thoughtful itinerary planning, and dependable local support to make travelling through Sri Lanka easier, safer, and more meaningful.

localKnowledge.title: Local Sri Lankan knowledge
localKnowledge.description: Thoughtful recommendations shaped by genuine experience of the island.

tailorMade.title: Tailor-made private journeys
tailorMade.description: Tours designed around your interests, dates, pace, and travel style.

personalSupport.title: Personal support throughout
personalSupport.description: Responsive assistance from your first conversation to your final transfer.

heading.title: Travel designed with care, knowledge, and local heart.
heading.description: Every private journey is thoughtfully planned around your interests, travel style, pace, and expectations.

locallyDesigned.title: Locally Designed
locallyDesigned.description: Journeys created by Sri Lankan experts who understand the island in depth.

personallyHosted.title: Personally Hosted
personallyHosted.description: Warm and responsive assistance from planning through the final airport transfer.

travelConfidence.title: Travel With Confidence
travelConfidence.description: Professional guides, comfortable vehicles, and dependable local support.

heading.title: Iconic destinations for an unforgettable journey
heading.description: Discover ancient kingdoms, misty hill country, wildlife-rich national parks, historic coastal cities, and tropical beaches.
